name: Karim
title: Token design advisor, angel investor, and DeFi degen
bio:
Welcome, I'm Karim.

I have a lot of fun vibecoding, rock climbing, and building in DeFi.

In the past I have:
* Contributed to Messari Research (a research and data firm in the crypto industry).
* Spent 2 years at Outlier Ventures (an early stage crypto investor and accelerator) as an in-house token designer, advising portfolio companies on incentive design, tokenomics, and product — primarily working with DeFi and infrastructure protocols.
* Angel invested and advised
* Assisted charities with setting up crypto custody infra and onramping to via OTC

Things I have built include:
* MEV-powered economic game — Built multiple iterations of an economic game protocol that leverages DeFi bribing strategies to bootstrap a prize pool. Over $1.7m in volume to date.
* Non-liquidatable leverage protocol — Partnered with Olympus Finance to build it. Ran a predeposit campaign that pulled in $5m in 3 days and peaked at $35m TVL post-launch. Generated over $500k in profit within 6 months. Also led the acquisition of an LST product which we added to the product suite
* Automated yield vault — Designed the strategy and built the partnerships that powered the mechanics.
* Yield bearing wrappers - Leveraged a gas fee refund mechanism to create this, and won $80k in prize money across 2 hackathons (which I quickly and unsuccessfully invested in trying to grow those products)

experience.title: Token Designer
experience.description: Advised early stage crypto protocols on incentive design, product, and token economics

experience.title: DeFi Builder
experience.description: Building permissionless protocols, winning hackathons, and experimenting with MEV-based economic games
